manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

competent

Related words are:

- efficient
- skilled
- capable

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

content.thinking:
I need to describe "competent" without using:
- competent (or its variants like competence, competently)
- efficient
- efficient
- skilled
- capable

I need to think of synonyms or ways to describe someone who is competent:
- qualified
- able
- proficient
- adequate
- good at their job
- knows what they're doing
- has the necessary abilities

Let me give a short, clear clue:

"Qualified and able to do the job properly"

Wait, let me make it shorter and more direct:

"Qualified to handle the task adequately"

Or: "Having sufficient ability to perform a job well"

Or: "Adequate and qualified for the role"

Let me go with something concise and clear.

content.text: CLUE: Qualified and adequately able to perform a task or job properly

clem_player.response: CLUE: Qualified and adequately able to perform a task or job properly

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: Qualified and adequately able to perform a task or job properly

content.thinking:
The clue describes someone who is "qualified and adequately able to perform a task or job properly." This sounds like they're describing someone who is:

- Competent
- Capable
- Qualified
- Proficient
- Skilled
- Able
- Adequate

The most common word that fits this description would be "competent" - it means having the necessary ability, knowledge, or skill to do something successfully.

Let me go with "competent" as my first guess.
